description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern L-shaped design, combining a light wood grain finish with contrasting black and concrete-textured panels. The main section includes a raised privacy panel and a spacious work surface, with multiple drawers and open shelves for storage. The left side is clad in a concrete-like material, while the right side and front are finished in a light wood veneer. The interior workspace is predominantly black, with three drawers on the left and additional shelving above and below the desk surface. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as reception areas or offices. The design is both functional and visually striking, offering ample storage and organizational options.
description: A modern L-shaped filing cabinet with light wood, black, and concrete-textured finishes, featuring multiple drawers and open shelving for storage.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the light wood paneling and the concrete-textured section on the left, with the black work surface partially visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the full height of the light wood privacy panel and a glimpse of the black shelving and drawers behind it.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the black workspace, three drawers, open shelving, and the combination of wood and concrete finishes.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the concrete-textured panel and the black work surface, with the wood paneling receding into the background.
